display.purpose: One primary workflow heading per view.

label.purpose: Buttons, fields, selectors, and compact controls.

shadows.name: panel-ambient
shadows.purpose: Separates the principal workflow stage from the page.

shadows.name: control-lift
shadows.purpose: Brief hover feedback on actionable buttons.

shadows.name: preview-vignette
shadows.purpose: Preserves control contrast over generated imagery.

motion.name: scene-fade
motion.purpose: Crossfades illustrated scenes in the preview.

motion.name: ken-burns
motion.purpose: Slow image motion during playback only; disabled for reduced motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single current action in the workflow.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 52px; padding: 13.6px 20px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-terracotta-accessible, #8f4d32); color: #fffaf4; font: 700 16px/1.2 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; transition: transform 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 10px 20px -14px rgba(37,29,20,.45); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus-ring, #8f4d32); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-button-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-button-primary:disabled { background: #d0bcaa; color: #5f5347; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A supporting action that does not compete with the primary step.
components.css: .ds-button-secondary { min-height: 52px; padding: 13.6px 20px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-subtle, rgba(82,58,40,.18)); border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-surface-elevated, #fffaf4); color: var(--color-text-primary, #251d14); font: 700 16px/1.2 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; transition: transform 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease; } .ds-button-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); border-color: var(--color-border-emphasis, rgba(143,77,50,.32)); } .ds-button-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus-ring, #8f4d32); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-button-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Source Mode Control
components.description: Selects YouTube URL or audio upload with an explicit active state.
components.css: .ds-source-mode { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; } .ds-source-option { min-height: 52px; padding: 12.8px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(82,58,40,.16)); border-radius: 16px; background: var(--color-surface-elevated, #fffaf4); color: var(--color-text-primary, #251d14); font: 600 16px/1.2 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; transition: transform 150ms ease, border-color 150ms ease, background 150ms ease; } .ds-source-option:hover { transform: translateY(-1px); border-color: var(--color-border-emphasis, rgba(143,77,50,.32)); } .ds-source-option:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus-ring, #8f4d32); outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-source-option.is-active { background: var(--color-control-active-bg, #8f4d32); color: var(--color-control-active-text, #fffaf4); border-color: var(--color-control-active-bg, #8f4d32); }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: A large, readable source field with an explicit focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field-label { display: block; margin-bottom: 11px; color: var(--color-text-primary, #251d14); font: 700 16px/1.2 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; } .ds-text-field { width: 100%; min-height: 54px; padding: 14.4px 16px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border-strong, rgba(92,71,56,.22)); border-radius: 16px; background: var(--color-field-bg, #fffaf4); color: var(--color-text-primary, #251d14); font: 400 16px/1.6 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; } .ds-text-field::placeholder { color: var(--color-text-muted, #7b6656); opacity: 1; } .ds-text-field:hover { border-color: var(--color-border-emphasis, rgba(143,77,50,.32)); } .ds-text-field:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--color-focus-ring, #8f4d32); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Status Notice
components.description: A compact tonal message that combines color with explicit text.
components.html: Export complete.Your lesson video is ready to download.
components.css: .ds-notice-success { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 16px 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(82,58,40,.12); border-radius: 16px; background: #e3efe2; color: #251d14; font: 400 16px/1.5 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; } .ds-notice-success strong { font-weight: 700; } .ds-notice-success:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #8f4d32; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Workflow Panel
components.description: The principal stage container; internal content stays flat.
components.html:
Build your illustrated lesson

Add a source, follow progress, then review and export.
components.css: .ds-workflow-panel { max-width: 1152px; padding: clamp(20px,3vw,40px); border: 1px solid var(--color-border, rgba(82,58,40,.16)); border-radius: 24px; background: var(--color-paper, #fffaf4); color: var(--color-text-primary, #251d14); box-shadow: 0 24px 60px -32px var(--color-shadow, rgba(37,29,20,.12)); } .ds-workflow-panel h2 { margin: 0 0 16px; font: 600 clamp(32px,3.8vw,55px)/1.05 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; text-wrap: balance; } .ds-workflow-panel p { max-width: 70ch; margin: 0; color: var(--color-text-secondary, #5c4738); font: 400 16px/1.6 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; } .ds-workflow-panel:focus-within { border-color: var(--color-border-emphasis, rgba(143,77,50,.32)); }

components.name: Illustrated Preview Controls
components.description: Restrained media chrome over the lower edge of generated imagery.
components.html: Lesson title1:24 / 4:10
components.css: .ds-preview { position: relative; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 16/9; border-radius: 24px; background: #1d1711; } .ds-preview-image { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(135deg,#7d9b75,#b96e4d); } .ds-preview-controls { position: absolute; inset: auto 0 0; display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto minmax(100px,1fr) minmax(120px,2fr) auto; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 20px; background: linear-gradient(to top,rgba(25,18,12,.88),rgba(25,18,12,.12)); color: #fffaf4; font: 400 16px/1.35 'Source Serif 4', Georgia, serif; } .ds-preview-controls button { width: 56px; height: 56px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,250,244,.44); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255,250,244,.18); color: #fffaf4; } .ds-preview-controls button:hover { background: rgba(255,250,244,.26); } .ds-preview-controls button:focus-visible, .ds-preview-controls input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid #f3c680; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-preview-controls input { width: 100%; accent-color: #f3c680; }

narrative.overview:
Visualang is a focused workspace that turns spoken material into a finished learning artifact. The interface should feel cinematic only when imagery is the subject: the generated preview receives the largest visual field, while source input, progress, export, and download controls remain structured and quiet. This is a product workflow, not a film-marketing page.

The visual language pairs editorial serif type with a restrained clay-and-sage palette. Warmth comes from the imagery, type, and accents rather than from decorative effects. Controls use familiar affordances, status remains legible during long waits, and the interface becomes denser or simpler according to the current stage instead of presenting every function at once.

The system explicitly rejects generic AI startup styling, chatbot framing, prompt playgrounds, token dashboards, cosmic decoration, and empty SaaS hero compositions. Craft must serve the learning workflow and the exported video.
keyCharacteristics: Image-led preview with restrained surrounding chrome
Editorial warmth paired with product-level interaction clarity
Strong status communication without dashboard noise
Light and dark themes that preserve the same semantic hierarchy

rules.name: The One Action Color Rule
rules.body: Burnt Clay identifies primary action, current selection, and focus. It is not page decoration.

rules.name: The Preview Owns the Color Rule
rules.body: Generated artwork may be visually rich; surrounding controls stay neutral enough that the lesson remains dominant.

rules.name: The Semantic Pairing Rule
rules.body: Error, warning, information, and success states always combine text or iconography with color. Color alone never carries status.

rules.name: The One Editorial Moment Rule
rules.body: Playfair is reserved for the current stage heading or lesson title. Controls, labels, data, and status always use Source Serif 4.

rules.name: The Plain Status Rule
rules.body: Progress and error language is concise sentence case. Tracked uppercase text is not a default section scaffold.

rules.name: The Flat Workflow Rule
rules.body: Source, progress, and download structures use tonal contrast and dividers first. Shadows are reserved for the primary stage and interaction feedback.

rules.name: The No Nested Glass Rule
rules.body: Never place translucent blurred cards inside another elevated or blurred panel.

dos: Do make the generated preview the largest visual element once imagery is available.
Do preserve the source, processing, preview, export, and download sequence as one legible workflow.
Do use Burnt Clay for the single current primary action and Library Sage for completion.
Do keep body copy near 70 characters per line and maintain WCAG 2.2 AA contrast.
Do provide visible focus, keyboard operation, text-plus-color status, and reduced-motion behavior.
Do let dark media controls overlay the preview while keeping ordinary product surfaces mostly flat and tonal.
donts: Don't use generic AI startup interfaces built around purple gradients, cosmic glows, sparkles, or “magic” language.
Don't use chatbot, prompt-playground, agent-dashboard, or token-pill interaction models.
Don't use floating glass cards, empty center-column SaaS heroes, or decorative metrics that obscure the workflow.
Don't use generic content-generation framing that makes language learning or the exported video feel secondary.
Don't use noisy progress messaging, low-contrast controls, or motion that competes with the user’s task.
Don't copy a film-marketing landing page: no full-screen background video, giant slogan, or form floating over unpredictable imagery.
Don't use colored side-stripe borders, gradient text, nested cards, or border-plus-wide-shadow decoration.
Don't use Playfair Display for buttons, labels, playback data, or status messages.
